overview: A modern, responsive e-commerce platform for electronics — inspired by Amazon and Flipkart — with product browsing, filtering, cart, checkout, and user accounts.
features: Homepage with hero banner, trending products, and category grid
Product listing with price, brand, and rating filters
Product detail page with image gallery, specs, and reviews
Shopping cart with quantity controls and totals
User login via Internet Identity with protected routes
Order history and account management page
